Id1.text: Montreal Locomotive Works is the builder of the ALCO RS-3 which has a four-stroke engine.

Id2.text: The ALCO RS-3 built by the Montreal Locomotive Works has a four-stroke engine.

Id3.text: The ALCO RS-3 has a four-stroke engine and was built by the Montreal Locomotive Works.
